narration: A connected component is one whole group of nodes that can reach one another.
After we finish the first group, finding another unvisited node means we found a new component.
decision: In this graph, {A, B}, {C, D}, and {E} are three separate groups.

predictionPrompt.prompt: How many connected components does this graph have?

choices.feedback: Correct. There are two pairs and one isolated node.
Not this one. E also counts as its own component.

narration: Even one lonely node counts as a whole component by itself.
callout: A component can be large or tiny. Size does not matter here.
